channel.title: CERT@VDE — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by CERT@VDE (certvde).

item.title: CVE-2026-35083 · 8.8 HIGH — Stack buffer overflow in method bac-deviceobject
item.description: A remote attacker with user privileges can exploit a stack buffer overflow to gain full system access as root.

item.title: CVE-2026-35082 · 8.8 HIGH — Local file inclusion vulnerability and deletion in ugw-logread method
item.description: The ugw-logread method allows a remote attacker with user privileges to access arbitrary local files due to insufficient validation of user-supplied input.

item.title: CVE-2026-35078 · 8.1 HIGH — Arbitrary file delete vulnerability in method ugw-logstop
item.description: The ugw-logstop method allows a remote attacker with user privileges to delete arbitrary local files due to insufficient validation of user-controlled input.

item.title: CVE-2026-35077 · 8.1 HIGH — Arbitrary file delete vulnerability in method ugw-delete-file
item.description: The ugw-delete-file method allows a remote attacker with user privileges to delete arbitrary local files due to insufficient validation of user-controlled input.

item.title: CVE-2026-41032 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Phoenix Contact: Unauthenticated log download vulnerability in the firmware of CHARX SEC-3xxx charging controllers
item.description: It is possible for an unauthenticated adjacent attacker to download log files of the controller, which may disclose some restricted information.

item.title: CVE-2026-40852 · 7.2 HIGH — Command injection via malicious configuration
item.description: A highly authenticated attacker can alter the config generator injecting a payload into future created configurations. The device is not correctly checking this configuration value before passing it to an system execute leading to code execution. Thi…

item.title: CVE-2026-40851 · 8.4 HIGH — Command injection via USB
item.description: A local attacker can perform a confusion attack on the cfgparser via a specially crafted file on an USB stick leading to code execution. This can result in a total loss of confidentiality, integrity and availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-40850 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Unauthenticated SQLi in getAccountData function
item.description: An unauthenticated remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the getAccountData function due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidentialit…

item.title: CVE-2026-40849 · 7.1 HIGH — Authenticated SQLi in user_alarmprofile view
item.description: An low privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the user_alarmprofile view due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-40848 · 7.1 HIGH — Authenticated SQLi in tag view
item.description: An low privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the tag view due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-40847 · 7.1 HIGH — Authenticated SQLi in system_tag view
item.description: An low privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the system_tag view due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-40846 · 7.1 HIGH — Authenticated SQLi in system view
item.description: An low privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the system view due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-40845 · 7.1 HIGH — Authenticated SQLi in devices_configuration view
item.description: An low privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the devices_configuration view due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidential…

item.title: CVE-2026-40844 · 7.1 HIGH — Authenticated SQLi in dashboard view
item.description: An low privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the dashboard view due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-40843 · 7.1 HIGH — Authenticated SQLi in alarming view
item.description: An low privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the alarming view due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidentiality.

item.description: An low privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the getWidgetTags function due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidentiality.

item.description: An low privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the getProjectTags function due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidentiality…

item.description: An low privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the getDeviceScalings function due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidential…

item.description: An low privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the getProjectScalings function due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidentia…

item.title: CVE-2026-40836 · 7.1 HIGH — Authenticated SQLi in inmessage model
item.description: An low privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the inmessage model due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL DELETE command allowing for reading the whole database and deleting entrie…

item.title: CVE-2026-40835 · 7.1 HIGH — Authenticated SQLi in saveObjectFromData function
item.description: An low privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the saveObjectFromData function due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidentia…

item.description: An low privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the dash_layout.php files saveDashboardLayout function due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL INSERT command allowing for reading the…

item.description: An low privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the dash.php files saveDashboardLayout function due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL INSERT command allowing for reading the whole…

item.title: CVE-2026-40832 · 7.1 HIGH — Authenticated SQLi in getDevicegroups function
item.description: An low privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the getDevicegroups function due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidentialit…

item.title: CVE-2026-40831 · 7.1 HIGH — Authenticated SQLi in Easy View
item.description: An low privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the Easy View due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidentiality.

item.description: A high privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the admin.mbnetj.php files UpdateParam function due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL UPDATE command allowing for reading the whole…

item.description: A high privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the view.html.php files UpdateParam function due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL UPDATE command allowing for reading the whole dat…

item.title: CVE-2026-40828 · 7 HIGH — Authenticated SQLi in DeleteSysLogEntry function
item.description: A high privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the DeleteSysLogEntry function due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL DELETE command allowing for reading the whole database and dele…

item.description: A high privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the _RemoveRequest function due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL DELETE command allowing for reading the whole database and deletin…

item.description: A high privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the dsgvo_contracts view due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-40825 · 7 HIGH — Authenticated SQLi in accountstatus view
item.description: A high privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the accountstatus view devices parameter due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL UPDATE command allowing for reading the whole databas…

item.title: CVE-2026-40824 · 7 HIGH — Authenticated SQLi in accountstatus view
item.description: A high privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the accountstatus view userid parameter due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL UPDATE command allowing for reading the whole database…

item.title: CVE-2026-40823 · 7 HIGH — Authenticated SQLi in DevSerialReset function
item.description: A high privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the DevSerialReset function due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL UPDATE command allowing for reading the whole database and changin…

item.description: A high privileged remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the DevSerialReset function due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidentiality…

item.description: An unauthenticated remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the sync_data24 task due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidentiality.

item.description: An unauthenticated remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the _mb24api_getUserAccount function due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confi…

item.description: An unauthenticated remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the dataapi.php files _mb24confi_getTagAlarm function due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a to…

item.title: CVE-2026-40813 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Unauthenticated SQLi in getLiveValues
item.description: An unauthenticated remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the getLiveValues functions tagid parameter due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss o…

item.description: An unauthenticated remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the getLiveValues functions sn parameter due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of c…

item.description: An unauthenticated remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the ssoabstractservice due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-40810 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Unauthenticated SQLi in userinfo Endpoint
item.description: An unauthenticated remote attacker can exploit an unauthenticated SQL Injection vulnerability in the userinfo endpoint due to improper neutralization of special elements in a SQL SELECT command. This can result in a total loss of confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2025-41669 · 8.8 HIGH — Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity
item.description: The Web-based Management allows a remote low privileged Engineer user to install additional APPs on the device downloaded from the PLCnext Store without implementing any data verification mechanism, leading to the capability for an Engineer user to r…

item.title: CVE-2025-41670 · 8.7 HIGH — Untrusted Search Path
item.description: A local user with low privileges may be able to influence the behavior of a privileged system service by manipulating configuration or application-related files located in user-writable areas of the filesystem. The affected service processes data fro…

item.title: CVE-2026-8047 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Out-of-bounds Write in CODESYS Control
item.description: The affected products perform improper length checking when parsing incoming HTTP requests, resulting in a size-limited out-of-bounds write. An unauthenticated remote attacker can exploit this flaw to cause a denial of service via a system crash on t…
